mapper.select: SELECT a3.SNO AS sno, a3.LIST_NO AS listNo, b1.CAMP_NAME AS campName, a8.CUST_NAME AS custName, a3.RECALL_TIME AS recallTime, a1.LIST_LASTPHONE AS listLastphone, b1.CAMP_SERVICE_DT AS campServiceDt FROM tbca003 a3 JOIN tbca001 a1 ON a3.LIST_NO = a1.LIST_NO JOIN tbca008 a8 ON a1.CUST_NO = a8.CUST_NO JOIN tbcb001 b1 ON a3.LIST_CAMPCODE = b1.CAMP_CODE WHERE a3.RECALL_TIME BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} AND a3.REC_TIME IS NULL ORDER BY a3.RECALL_TIME ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE tbca003 SET RECALL_TIME = #{recallTime}, UPDATE_TIME = NOW(), UPDATE_USER = #{updateUser} WHERE SNO = #{sno} AND REC_TIME IS NULL
